article_items.description: ⚡ BREAKING AI UPDATE 🚨 22 New AI Events Detected 07 Jun 2026, 11:07 PM IST Major AI events just happened. Here's what you need to know: 🚀 NEW LAUNCH HIGH 💰 FINANCE & FINTECH AI Billions spent and hypothetical returns: the AI boom explained with six charts 📌 The Guardian Tech Expenditure is growing fast and consumer take-up accelerating. But alarm bells are sounding The race is very much on. Elon Musk’s SpaceX, which makes AI models as well as space rockets, announced last week it is seeking a $1.77tn (£1.31tn) valuation on the US stock market while Anthropic, the startup behind the Claude chatbot, said it had filed for an initial public offering . OpenAI, the developer of ChatGPT, is expected to follow. This latest peak in the AI market comes amid a multitrillion-do...
